summary:
The provided medical evidence contains no information about PF-05190457’s activity at the ghrelin receptor. Due to the complete absence of supporting data, it cannot be clinically asserted that PF-05190457 is an inverse agonist of the ghrelin receptor.  

Answer: \boxed{B}
